name: Sawdust Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve jello in cold water.
2. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
3. Add the reserved pineapple juice to the dissolved jello mixture.
4. Layer with sliced bananas on top. Refrigerate until hardened.
5. Mix flour, sugar, eggs, and pineapple juice for the second layer. Cook until thick and let cool.
6. Spread the cooled mixture over the hardened jello layer.
7. For the third layer, mix Dream Whip and milk until stiff. Add softened cream cheese and whip well.
8. Spread this mixture over the second layer of jello.
9. Grate cheese on top if desired.
10. Serve in a 13x9x2 inch dish.
